targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*)::double precision AS value
FROM public.chat_messages cm
INNER JOIN public.chat_sessions cs ON cs.id = cm.session_id
INNER JOIN public.projects p ON p.id = cs.project_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cm.created_at)
  AND ('__all' IN (${project:sqlstring}) OR p.name IN (${project:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${channel:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cs.channel, '') IN (${channel:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${role:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cm.role, '') IN (${role:sqlstring}));

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs.id)::double precision AS value
FROM public.chat_messages cm
INNER JOIN public.chat_sessions cs ON cs.id = cm.session_id
INNER JOIN public.projects p ON p.id = cs.project_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cm.created_at)
  AND ('__all' IN (${project:sqlstring}) OR p.name IN (${project:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${channel:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cs.channel, '') IN (${channel:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${role:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cm.role, '') IN (${role:sqlstring}));

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id)::double precision AS value
FROM public.chat_messages cm
INNER JOIN public.chat_sessions cs ON cs.id = cm.session_id
INNER JOIN public.projects p ON p.id = cs.project_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cm.created_at)
  AND ('__all' IN (${project:sqlstring}) OR p.name IN (${project:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${channel:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cs.channel, '') IN (${channel:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${role:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cm.role, '') IN (${role:sqlstring}));

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT NULLIF(COALESCE(cs.channel, ''), ''))::double precision AS value
FROM public.chat_messages cm
INNER JOIN public.chat_sessions cs ON cs.id = cm.session_id
INNER JOIN public.projects p ON p.id = cs.project_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cm.created_at)
  AND ('__all' IN (${project:sqlstring}) OR p.name IN (${project:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${channel:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cs.channel, '') IN (${channel:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${role:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cm.role, '') IN (${role:sqlstring}));

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(cm.created_at, '1d'),
  COUNT(*)::double precision AS value
FROM public.chat_messages cm
INNER JOIN public.chat_sessions cs ON cs.id = cm.session_id
INNER JOIN public.projects p ON p.id = cs.project_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cm.created_at)
  AND ('__all' IN (${project:sqlstring}) OR p.name IN (${project:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${channel:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cs.channel, '') IN (${channel:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${role:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cm.role, '') IN (${role:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(cm.role, ''), 'Unknown') AS label,
  COUNT(*)::double precision AS value
FROM public.chat_messages cm
INNER JOIN public.chat_sessions cs ON cs.id = cm.session_id
INNER JOIN public.projects p ON p.id = cs.project_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(cm.created_at)
  AND ('__all' IN (${project:sqlstring}) OR p.name IN (${project:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${channel:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cs.channel, '') IN (${channel:sqlstring}))
  AND ('__all' IN (${role:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cm.role, '') IN (${role:sqlstring}))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY value DESC, label ASC;

SELECT
  MIN(cleaned_content) AS label,
  COUNT(*)::double precision AS value
FROM (
  SELECT
    TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(cm.content, '\\s+', ' ', 'g')) AS cleaned_content,
    LOWER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(cm.content, '\\s+', ' ', 'g'))) AS normalized_content
  FROM public.chat_messages cm
  INNER JOIN public.chat_sessions cs ON cs.id = cm.session_id
  INNER JOIN public.projects p ON p.id = cs.project_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(cm.created_at)
    AND LOWER(cm.role) = 'user'
    AND CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(cm.content)) > 0
    AND ('__all' IN (${project:sqlstring}) OR p.name IN (${project:sqlstring}))
    AND ('__all' IN (${channel:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cs.channel, '') IN (${channel:sqlstring}))
    AND ('__all' IN (${role:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cm.role, '') IN (${role:sqlstring}))
) prompts
GROUP BY normalized_content
ORDER BY value DESC, label ASC
LIMIT 8;

SELECT
  TO_CHAR(hour_bucket, 'HH24:00') || '-' || TO_CHAR(hour_bucket, 'HH24:59') || ' UTC' AS label,
  count_value AS value
FROM (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('hour', cm.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS hour_bucket,
    COUNT(*)::double precision AS count_value
  FROM public.chat_messages cm
  INNER JOIN public.chat_sessions cs ON cs.id = cm.session_id
  INNER JOIN public.projects p ON p.id = cs.project_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(cm.created_at)
    AND ('__all' IN (${project:sqlstring}) OR p.name IN (${project:sqlstring}))
    AND ('__all' IN (${channel:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cs.channel, '') IN (${channel:sqlstring}))
    AND ('__all' IN (${role:sqlstring}) OR COALESCE(cm.role, '') IN (${role:sqlstring}))
  GROUP BY 1
) hourly
ORDER BY value DESC, label ASC
LIMIT 8;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT p.name AS __text, p.name AS __value FROM public.projects p INNER JOIN public.chat_sessions cs ON cs.project_id = p.id INNER JOIN public.chat_messages cm ON cm.session_id = cs.id ORDER BY 1
list.label: Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT p.name AS __text, p.name AS __value FROM public.projects p INNER JOIN public.chat_sessions cs ON cs.project_id = p.id INNER JOIN public.chat_messages cm ON cm.session_id = cs.id ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT cs.channel AS __text, cs.channel AS __value FROM public.chat_sessions cs INNER JOIN public.chat_messages cm ON cm.session_id = cs.id WHERE cs.channel IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(cs.channel)) > 0 ORDER BY 1
list.label: Channel
list.name: channel
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT cs.channel AS __text, cs.channel AS __value FROM public.chat_sessions cs INNER JOIN public.chat_messages cm ON cm.session_id = cs.id WHERE cs.channel IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(cs.channel)) > 0 ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT cm.role AS __text, cm.role AS __value FROM public.chat_messages cm WHERE cm.role IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(cm.role)) > 0 ORDER BY 1
list.label: Role
list.name: role
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT cm.role AS __text, cm.role AS __value FROM public.chat_messages cm WHERE cm.role IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(cm.role)) > 0 ORDER BY 1
